package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for path_param_parsing_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated `strconv` or UUID path-param parsing logic that should live in helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule112NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule112NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule112NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario112Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule112NegativeService, input Rule112NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
